body.u: I left school at the age of sixteen and went out to work for the first time three months after I left school. I was in heavy engineering. But at first it was all training courses and after about 3 years I went onto a lighter engineering and stayed there for about 12 years and then went into the fire service werewhere I stayed. I got married and moved up north were we lived for about 1 yearsyear after that time we had 2 children a boy and a Girl aged 3 and 4. and then I was posted to fire chief and was moved to the south of England near Cornwall.
